extraction.one_line_summary: DEMAR Arnold won from the front after Groupama-FDJ paced the 20km climb at 4% to drop pure sprinters Cavendish and Ewan permanently.
tactical_patterns: Machiavelli sent entire team to pace 20km/4% climb specifically targeting Cavendish/Ewan, successfully eliminating pure sprinters with 10km remaining.
SWIFT Ben strategically took 3-second intermediate sprint bonus to deny GC rider ALMEIDA, revealing intermediate sprint points as blocking tactic.
Groupama-FDJ's SCOTSON won corner positioning race with 1km to go on critical technical turn, enabling clean leadout despite headwind.

rider_signals.CAVENDISH Mark: negative: first sprinter dropped on gentle 4% climb, lost over minute with 10km remaining, never regained contact
rider_signals.EWAN Caleb: negative: isolated with single teammate on 4% climb while rivals dropped him, finished 2+ minutes down
rider_signals.DEMAR Arnold: positive: rejoined peloton after being dropped on climb then immediately sent team to front, showing tactical control
rider_signals.SWIFT Ben: neutral: tactically sophisticated to steal intermediate sprint bonuses from GC riders rather than letting them accumulate
rider_signals.SCOTSON Miles: positive: won critical corner positioning battle 1km out enabling clean leadout despite technical finale and headwind
